content.text: This is a new namespace/task. Let me start by collecting failure information.

input.command:
echo "=== JOB STATUS ==="
kubectl get job etl-job -n spark-etl
echo "=== PODS ==="
kubectl get pods -n spark-etl
echo "=== JOB LOGS ==="
kubectl logs -n spark-etl -l app=etl-job --tail=100 2>&1

content.text: Job is currently running. Let me wait and watch for it to fail.

input.command:
kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/etl-job -n spark-etl --timeout=180s 2>&1 || true
echo "=== after wait ==="
kubectl get job etl-job -n spark-etl
kubectl get pods -n spark-etl
